title: ActionHook Base Payload
description: Common fields present in every actionHook callback payload. All verb-specific callback schemas extend this base.

from.description: Caller phone number or SIP URI.

to.description: Called phone number or SIP URI.

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing identifier for correlating logs across jambonz components.

originating_sip_ip.description: IP address of the originating SIP trunk.

originating_sip_trunk_name.description: Name of the originating SIP trunk as configured in jambonz.

api_base_url.description: jambonz REST API base URL. Use this for mid-call control via the REST API.
